hero.desc: Crafting motion that moves people — from concept to final frame. Brands, broadcasts, and everything in between.

about.bio1: I'm a 3D Motion Designer based in Tel Aviv, crafting visual stories for brands, TV channels, and agencies.
about.bio2: I believe great motion design communicates something real — whether a broadcast package or a full brand film, I bring the same level of craft to every frame.
about.skills: Cinema 4D, After Effects, Octane Render, Redshift, Motion Graphics, Broadcast Design, 3D Animation
